ocr_findings.description: The tree diagram (カレントディレクトリからのパス指定②) is rendered as ASCII art with emoji placeholders (🍌🍊🍎) and box-drawing characters rather than an actual image reference. Structure is approximated but spatial relationships between nodes (音楽, 画像, カレントディレクトリ, subdirectories) are roughly preserved.

Page header '12-02 データ管理とファイルシステム' and chapter sidebar '第12章 ソフトウェア' appear at the end of the cleaned output rather than at the top/side, reflecting layout normalization by the Claude-Vision re-OCR pass.

reviewer_notes: Content page explaining 1-level-up directory notation (ルール4: 1階層上のディレクトリは「..」で表す). All prose text captured accurately including the key example '../音楽/どんぐりころころ.mp3'. The cleaned version attempts an ASCII art tree diagram rather than an image placeholder, which is a reasonable reconstruction. Bold formatting on '..' and '../' key terms is correctly applied.
